# Tron Multisender

> Non-custodial batch transfer tool on TRON for sending TRX, TRC-10, and TRC-20 tokens (including USDT) to up to 1,000+ wallet addresses in a single on-chain transaction — saving ~90% in fees compared to one-by-one transfers. No registration, no key custody.

Tron Multisender is part of [Multisender.app](https://multisender.app), operating since 2018 with $585M+ total volume distributed across 51+ networks. The smart contract is audited and deployed on TRON mainnet. Supported wallets: TronLink, TokenPocket, any TronWeb-compatible wallet.

## Docs

- [Home](https://trxsend.com): Product overview, features, supported tokens, pricing, and FAQ
- [Guide](https://trxsend.com/guide): Step-by-step tutorial for batch-sending TRX and TRC-20 tokens (connect wallet → prepare list → approve → multisend)
- [VIP](https://trxsend.com/vip): VIP plan details (reduced per-transaction service fees for high-volume senders)
- [Referral](https://trxsend.com/referral): Referral program for distributing promotional fee discounts to your audience

## Use Cases

- Airdrop TRC-20 tokens or USDT to community members
- Pay crypto salaries or rewards in TRX/USDT to multiple wallets
- Distribute DAO treasury funds to contributors in one transaction
- Token sale distributions to investors
- Marketing campaigns and promotional token distributions
- CSV-based bulk transfers for teams and enterprises

## Key Facts

- Supported tokens: TRX (native), TRC-10, TRC-20 (USDT, USDC, WTRX, BTT, any contract address)
- Max recipients per transaction: 1,000+
- Fee savings vs manual sending: ~90%
- Custody model: Non-custodial — private keys never leave the user's wallet
- Registration: Not required
- Wallet support: TronLink, TokenPocket, any TronWeb-compatible wallet
- Smart contract: Audited, deployed on TRON mainnet
- Parent product: [Multisender.app](https://multisender.app) — since 2018, $585M+ total volume, 51+ networks

## Optional

- [Multisender.app](https://multisender.app): Multi-chain parent product (EVM + non-EVM networks beyond TRON)
